words.answer: I need to finish this report today.

words.hint: Czy możesz przesłać mi najnowszą wersję pliku?
words.answer: Can you send me the latest version of the file?
We have a meeting at ten in the morning.
Please check your email inbox.

words.hint: Ten projekt wymaga jeszcze kilku poprawek.
words.answer: This project still needs a few adjustments.

words.hint: Musimy omówić budżet na przyszły rok.
words.answer: We need to discuss the budget for next year.

words.hint: Spóźnię się kilka minut na wideokonferencję.
words.answer: I’ll be a few minutes late for the video conference.
Where did we save the survey results?
I sent you a calendar invite.

words.hint: Muszę zadzwonić do klienta w sprawie umowy.
words.answer: I need to call the client about the contract.
Your presentation made a good impression.
The laptop froze again.

words.hint: Czy mogę pożyczyć na chwilę drukarkę?
words.answer: Can I use the printer for a moment?
Save the file on the shared drive.
Who is taking notes during today’s meeting?

words.hint: Chciałbym poprosić o dzień wolny w przyszłym tygodniu.
words.answer: I’d like to ask for a day off next week.

words.hint: Potrzebujemy nowego oprogramowania do zarządzania zadaniami.
words.answer: We need new software for task management.

words.hint: Przepraszam, ale mam konflikt w kalendarzu.
words.answer: Sorry, but I have a scheduling conflict.
Could we reschedule our meeting?
I sent the invoice to the accounting department.

words.hint: Musimy zrobić kopię zapasową tych danych.
words.answer: We need to back up this data.
The boss asked for a short summary.

words.hint: Nie mogę znaleźć tego dokumentu w folderze.
words.answer: I can’t find that document in the folder.
Please turn on the projector.

words.hint: O której godzinie zaczyna się szkolenie?
words.answer: What time does the training start?

words.hint: Mam za dużo maili do przeczytania.
words.answer: I have too many emails to read.

words.hint: Czy możesz mi pomóc z tym arkuszem kalkulacyjnym?
words.answer: Can you help me with this spreadsheet?
I forgot to attach the file to the email.

words.hint: Potrzebuję więcej czasu na przygotowanie prezentacji.
words.answer: I need more time to prepare the presentation.

words.hint: Zostało nam piętnaście minut na dyskusję.
words.answer: We have fifteen minutes left for discussion.
Is the printer working?
Log in to the shared account.
My computer is running very slowly.

words.hint: Zamknij proszę drzwi od sali konferencyjnej.
words.answer: Please close the conference room door.
Has anyone prepared the meeting agenda?
I sent you a link to the document.

words.hint: Musimy skończyć ten projekt przed końcem tygodnia.
words.answer: We need to finish this project by the end of the week.

words.hint: Kto będzie odpowiedzialny za ten dział?
words.answer: Who will be responsible for this department?

words.hint: Czy możesz zrobić kopię tego dokumentu?
words.answer: Can you make a copy of this document?
The meeting will last about an hour.
I need access to that folder.
Have you seen the new schedule?
We need to prepare the annual report.
Please be patient for a moment.

words.hint: To zadanie wymaga współpracy kilku osób.
words.answer: This task requires the cooperation of several people.

words.hint: Czy możesz sprawdzić dane w tabeli?
words.answer: Can you check the data in the table?
I’m just starting a video call.

words.hint: Czy mogę przedstawić Ci nowego pracownika?
words.answer: May I introduce you to the new employee?

words.hint: Mam problem z zalogowaniem się do systemu.
words.answer: I’m having trouble logging into the system.
I sent the documents by courier.
I need to sign this contract.
Please prepare the meeting minutes.
Yesterday we had a system failure.

words.hint: Czy możesz wysłać mi krótkie podsumowanie?
words.answer: Can you send me a short summary?
We need to set a new date.
The printer ran out of ink.

words.hint: Czy masz chwilę na szybkie pytanie?
words.answer: Do you have a moment for a quick question?

words.hint: To zadanie jest bardziej skomplikowane niż myślałem.
words.answer: This task is more complicated than I thought.

words.hint: Szef chce, żebyśmy pracowali nad tym razem.
words.answer: The boss wants us to work on this together.
I sent you the corrected version of the document.
We need to analyze the sales data.
The meeting has been canceled.
Please note this in the calendar.
Can you prepare a task list?
I have a problem opening the attachment.
We don’t have much time left.
Can someone pass me the marker?

words.hint: Chciałbym omówić ten pomysł na osobności.
words.answer: I’d like to discuss this idea in private.
We need to organize new training.
Please check the accuracy of the numbers.
